falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 rises by 5% or more in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong upward move would contradict the pattern's implication of a bottom or consolidation phase, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant rise in blowoff pressure would indicate extreme overbought conditions, directly opposing the current HOLD/UNKNOWN verdict's implied stability.

falsification_conditions.condition: CBOE VIX drops below 15 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such low volatility would suggest market complacency, refuting the pattern's implied risk of a blowoff or significant move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
